title: Implement federation scaling FEPs
description:
Implement FEP-8fcf (Follower Collection Synchronization), SharedInbox optimization, and FEP-f228 (Conversation Backfill) to improve federation efficiency.

## FEP-8fcf: Follower Sync
- Add Collection-Synchronization HTTP header with SHA256 XOR digest of follower URIs
- On digest mismatch, fetch authoritative list and reconcile
- Already deployed in Mastodon since 2022

## SharedInbox
- Single endpoint for all actors on instance
- Reduces fanout when delivering to multiple recipients on same server
- Standard AP spec feature

## FEP-f228: Conversation Backfill
- Implement context owner concept
- Expose OrderedCollection of conversation members
- Enable single-request thread fetching
close_reason: All 3 subtasks complete: SharedInbox (already existed), FEP-8fcf, FEP-f228
